sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

after_seg = after.segmentation['nodes']

print("Before UP - player nodes:")
for n in before_seg:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:  # white or light green
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

print("\nAfter UP - player nodes:")
for n in after_seg:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

print(f"\nResult: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>

Now I need to figure out the goal. The player is at row 44-47, col 32-35. There are blue square targets in charcoal frames. Let me explore more to understand what the goal is - likely collecting the blue squares or navigating to certain positions.
